notes: focal_wall_rect: [left,top,right,bottom] normalized 0-1 — tight around the actual display surface in the photo. eye_level_fraction: artwork vertical centre as fraction of focal rect height (0=top,1=bottom). For pedestal scenes the compositor anchors artwork BOTTOM to focal rect BOTTOM (plinth surface). placement_quad: 4 corners TL,TR,BR,BL for perspective warp. wall_span_cm: real-world focal rect width for physical scale. Run scripts/calibrate_scene_placement.py to auto-refine with GPT-4o Vision.

scenes.label: Gallery — white wall
scenes.description: Neutral wall lighting; default for most two-dimensional work.

scenes.label: Residential — warm interior
scenes.description: Warm ambient light; home visualization. Artwork hangs on the accent wall above the sofa.

scenes.label: Residential — cool modern
scenes.description: Cool contemporary living space. Feature wall panel at centre — this is the primary display surface.

scenes.label: Office — minimal
scenes.description: Clean office; main display wall spans left-to-centre (window on far left, doorway on far right excluded).

scenes.label: Hotel — lobby luxury
scenes.description: Warm upscale hospitality. Central square white feature wall panel framed by pilasters.

scenes.label: Corridor — gallery run
scenes.description: Gallery corridor; the large white end wall is the display surface. Focal rect covers the wall face only — ceiling track lights and floor are excluded.

scenes.label: Studio — natural north light
scenes.description: Soft directional daylight reference. Plain studio wall fills most of the frame.

scenes.label: Plinth — sculpture spotlight
scenes.description: Freestanding plinth at centre; artwork sits ON TOP of the plinth surface. focal_wall_rect covers the full region from wall top down to the plinth surface (bottom of rect = plinth top = artwork rests here). Compositor anchors artwork bottom to ry1.

scenes.label: Café — brick feature wall
scenes.description: Warm bistro-style exposed brick; artwork hangs on the central feature wall.

scenes.label: Library — wood study
scenes.description: Dark wood-paneled study wall; classic framing suits works on paper and oils.

scenes.label: Boutique — retail display wall
scenes.description: Chic retail niche with a clean centred panel for photography or small works.

scenes.label: Wellness — spa calm
scenes.description: Soft sage and daylight; serene wall for restorative or abstract imagery.

scenes.label: Loft — raw concrete
scenes.description: Industrial loft with a broad concrete display plane and side structural mass.

scenes.label: Museum — salon molding
scenes.description: Neoclassical salon with inner cream field framed by simple molding.

scenes.label: Bedroom — soft neutral
scenes.description: Residential bedroom; artwork sits on the upper wall above the headboard line.
